---
name: New Sport Request
about: Request a new sport to be added
labels: ["new-sport"]
---

## Sport Name

<!-- Name of the sport. If this is a tournament/championship/league/series
     variant of a sport already in the corpus (e.g. WNBA Basketball alongside
     NBA Basketball), suggest the parens form: "Basketball (WNBA)". -->

## Governing Body

<!-- Official governing body (leave blank for casual/custom sports) -->

## Category

<!-- One of: Team Sports, Combat Sports, Individual Sports, Racquet Sports,
     Motor Sports, Water Sports, Winter Sports, Esports, Equestrian, or one
     of the pre-staged categories (Athletics, Aquatics, Cycling, Gymnastics,
     Precision Sports). For Custom: Casual, Party, Mini Sports, etc. -->

## Variant of Existing Sport?

<!-- If this sport is a tournament/championship/league/series companion to
     a ruleset already on opensourcesports.io, name the canonical sport
     here (e.g. "Basketball", "Golf", "Formula 1"). Leave blank if this is
     the first entry for its sport. -->

## Source URL

<!-- Direct link to the official rulebook PDF or rule-index page —
     NOT the org's homepage. This is the single most important field for
     accuracy. -->

## Why Now?

<!-- Optional: event/season hook that makes this sport time-relevant
     (e.g. "Kentucky Derby is May 2", "WNBA season starts May 8"). Helps
     prioritize the queue. -->

## Priority

- [ ] Olympic sport
- [ ] Professional league
- [ ] Collegiate (NCAA / equivalent)
- [ ] Regional/emerging sport
- [ ] Casual/recreational game

## Notes

<!-- Any additional context — secondary sources, why this sport should be
     included, related sports already in the corpus, etc. -->
